description: PCL (PixInsight Class Library) Core API Schema

pcl.description: Primary namespace containing all PixInsight Class Library components

Image.description: Core class representing a 2D image with multiple channels. Supports various pixel formats and color spaces.

constructors.signature: Image(int width, int height, int numberOfChannels = 1, int colorSpace = ColorSpace::Gray)

Sample.signature: double Sample(int x, int y, int channel = 0) const

SetSample.signature: void SetSample(double value, int x, int y, int channel = 0)

Apply.signature: void Apply(double value, int op = ImageOp::Mov)
Apply.description: Applies operation with scalar to all pixels

AllocateData.signature: void AllocateData(int width, int height, int numberOfChannels = 1, int colorSpace = ColorSpace::Gray)

ImageWindow.description: Represents a PixInsight image window containing views and providing GUI integration.

constructors.signature: ImageWindow(int width, int height, int numberOfChannels = 1, int bitsPerSample = 32, bool floatSample = true, bool color = false, const IsoString& id = IsoString())

MainView.description: Returns main view of the window

SetViewIdSampleFormat.signature: void SetViewIdSampleFormat(const IsoString& id, int bitsPerSample, bool floatSample)

View.description: Represents a view of an image within an ImageWindow.

Console.description: Interface to PixInsight's process console for text output and user interaction.

String.description: Unicode string class with comprehensive string manipulation methods.

Insert.signature: String& Insert(size_type pos, const String& s)

Replace.signature: String& Replace(const String& s1, const String& s2)

Substring.signature: String Substring(size_type pos, size_type n = maxPos) const

Find.signature: size_type Find(const String& s, size_type pos = 0) const

IsoString.description: ISO 8859-1 string class for identifiers and ASCII text.

Array.description: Dynamic array container template with automatic memory management.

constructors.description: Creates with n copies of v

Insert.signature: iterator Insert(iterator pos, const T& v)

Vector.description: Mathematical vector class with linear algebra operations.

Matrix.description: Mathematical matrix class for linear algebra and transformations.

constructors.signature: Matrix(double value, int rows, int cols)
Matrix(const double* data, int rows, int cols)

SVD.signature: void SVD(Matrix& U, Vector& S, Matrix& V) const

NumberOfThreads.signature: static int NumberOfThreads(int count, int overheadLimit = 1)

Mutex.description: Mutual exclusion lock for thread synchronization.

AutoLock.description: RAII wrapper for automatic mutex locking/unlocking.

File.description: File I/O class with comprehensive file operations.

Open.signature: void Open(const String& path, FileMode mode)

Write.signature: size_type Write(const void* buffer, size_type size)

Copy.signature: static void Copy(const String& src, const String& dst)

Move.signature: static void Move(const String& src, const String& dst)

WriteTextFile.signature: static void WriteTextFile(const String& path, const IsoString& text)

XISFReader.description: Reader for XISF (Extensible Image Serialization Format) files.

XISFWriter.description: Writer for XISF (Extensible Image Serialization Format) files.

WriteProperty.signature: void WriteProperty(const IsoString& id, const Variant& value)

MetaModule.description: Base class for PixInsight module definitions. Each module must have exactly one MetaModule subclass.

GetReleaseDate.signature: virtual void GetReleaseDate(int& year, int& month, int& day) const

MetaProcess.description: Describes a process that can be instantiated and executed.

CanProcessViews.description: Returns true if can process views

CanProcessGlobal.description: Returns true if can execute globally

ProcessImplementation.description: Holds the actual parameters and implements execution of a process.

IsHistoryUpdater.signature: virtual bool IsHistoryUpdater(const View& view) const

IsMaskable.signature: virtual bool IsMaskable(const View& view, const ImageWindow& mask) const

CanExecuteOn.signature: virtual bool CanExecuteOn(const View& view, String& whyNot) const

CanExecuteGlobal.description: Returns true if can execute globally

ProcessInterface.description: Provides the graphical user interface for a process.

Launch.signature: virtual bool Launch(const MetaProcess&, const ProcessImplementation*, bool& dynamic, unsigned& flags)

ValidateProcess.signature: virtual bool ValidateProcess(const ProcessImplementation&, String& whyNot) const

Control.description: Base class for all UI controls and widgets.

Insert.signature: void Insert(int index, Control& control, int stretchFactor = 0)

RadioButton.description: Radio button for mutually exclusive options.

NumericControl.description: Numeric input with label and slider.

InsertItem.signature: void InsertItem(int index, const String& text)

TreeBox.description: Tree view control for hierarchical data.

SetHeaderText.signature: void SetHeaderText(int col, const String& text)

AddPage.signature: void AddPage(Control& page, const String& label)

InsertPage.signature: void InsertPage(int index, Control& page, const String& label)

SetPageLabel.signature: void SetPageLabel(int index, const String& label)

DrawLine.signature: void DrawLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2)

DrawRect.signature: void DrawRect(int x, int y, int w, int h)

FillRect.signature: void FillRect(int x, int y, int w, int h, const Brush& brush)

DrawEllipse.signature: void DrawEllipse(int x, int y, int w, int h)

FillEllipse.signature: void FillEllipse(int x, int y, int w, int h, const Brush& brush)

DrawText.signature: void DrawText(int x, int y, const String& text)

DrawTextRect.signature: void DrawTextRect(int x, int y, int w, int h, const String& text, int align = 0)

DrawBitmap.signature: void DrawBitmap(int x, int y, const Bitmap& bitmap)

DrawScaledBitmap.signature: void DrawScaledBitmap(int x, int y, int w, int h, const Bitmap& bitmap)

Bitmap.description: Raster image for UI and rendering.

Pixel.signature: RGBA Pixel(int x, int y) const

SetPixel.signature: void SetPixel(int x, int y, RGBA color)

Save.signature: void Save(const String& filePath, int quality = 90) const

Pen.description: Defines line and outline drawing style.

constructors.description: Creates pen with color and width
Creates font with family and size

Exception.description: Base exception class for error handling.

Initialize.signature: void Initialize(const String& info, size_type count)

constructors.signature: PSFFit(const Image& image, const Point& pos, const Rect& rect, PSFunction function = PSFunction::Gaussian)

AstrometricMetadata.description: World Coordinate System (WCS) metadata for images.

ImageToWorld.signature: bool ImageToWorld(DPoint& world, const DPoint& image) const

WorldToImage.signature: bool WorldToImage(DPoint& image, const DPoint& world) const

constructors.signature: Crop(double left, double top, double right, double bottom)

SetMargins.signature: void SetMargins(double left, double top, double right, double bottom)
